milestone_brief: Close F-L2 deferred from enriques-hq-smoothing-2026q3-e1 (also flagged by qtawesome-icons-2026q2-e2 F-L2). When the user switches variety while the Double-pass smooth toggle is enabled, app.py:_on_variety_changed calls self.appearance_panel.set_hq_smoothing_eligible(False) which silently flips the toggle off via the blockSignals() programmatic-reset pattern. There is no user-visible acknowledgment that the toggle was auto-disabled — the user may notice the unchecked button after the variety switch and wonder if they did something wrong, or assume the next render is HQ-smoothed when it is not. Scope: in _on_variety_changed, BEFORE calling set_hq_smoothing_eligible(False), capture the prior hq_smoothing state via self.appearance_panel.hq_smoothing; if True, surface a one-shot statusBar().showMessage acknowledgment AFTER the variety status message ("Variety: K3. Now choose a model. Double-pass smooth disabled — only available on Enriques figs 1+2."). The acknowledgment must NOT block, must NOT delay the variety switch, and must NOT use a modal dialog. AI-9 safe: pure showMessage call, no processEvents. AI-15 honest: explicitly explains WHY the auto-disable happened (per-subtype scope per CONTEXT.md §8.13). Tests: pure source-grep (AI-2) asserting the captured-prior-state read + the conditional showMessage appears in _on_variety_changed. Acceptance: user enables Double-pass smooth on Enriques Fig.1, then switches variety to K3 — status bar shows the acknowledgment. User switches between Enriques figs (where HQ stays eligible) — no acknowledgment fires (silent transition).
